command:
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\temp\gbp' -Force | Out-Null; $py = @'
import json, time, os, sys
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
os.makedirs(r"C:\temp\gbp\screenshots", exist_ok=True)
RF = r"C:\temp\gbp\result.json"
B = {"name":"Boncoin Fast Food","addr":"02 Boulevard Benarbia Lahouari, Oran, Algeria","cat":"Fast food restaurant","phone":"","desc":"Sandwiches, Pizza, Burger, Tacos"}
steps = []
def log(s, st, d=""): steps.append({"step":s,"status":st,"detail":d}); print(f"[{st}] {s}: {d}")
try:
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        br = p.chromium.launch(headless=False, slow_mo=500)
        ctx = br.new_context(viewport={"width":1280,"height":900}, locale="en-US")
        pg = ctx.new_page()
        pg.goto("https://business.google.com/create", timeout=30000)
        pg.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=15000)
        time.sleep(3)
        pg.screenshot(path=r"C:\temp\gbp\screenshots\step1.png")
        log("Navigate","OK",pg.url)
        if "accounts.google" in pg.url:
            log("Login","NEED","Login page detected - waiting 90s for manual login")
            for i in range(18):
                time.sleep(5)
                if "accounts.google" not in pg.url: log("Login","OK","Logged in"); break
            pg.screenshot(path=r"C:\temp\gbp\screenshots\step2_login.png")
        time.sleep(2)
        inputs = pg.query_selector_all("input[type=text]")
        if inputs:
            inputs[0].fill(B["name"])
            log("Name","OK",B["name"])
            time.sleep(1)
        pg.screenshot(path=r"C:\temp\gbp\screenshots\step3_name.png")
        btns = pg.query_selector_all("button")
        for b in btns:
            t = b.inner_text().lower()
            if any(w in t for w in ["next","continue","create","التالي"]):
                b.click(); log("Click","OK",t); time.sleep(3); break
        pg.screenshot(path=r"C:\temp\gbp\screenshots\step4.png")
        log("Progress","OK",pg.url)
        time.sleep(5)
        br.close()
except Exception as e:
    log("Error","FAIL",str(e))
res = {"status":"DONE" if any(s["status"]=="OK" for s in steps) else "FAIL","steps":steps}
with open(RF,"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: json.dump(res,f,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)
print(json.dumps(res,ensure_ascii=False))
'@; $py | Set-Content -Path 'C:\temp\gbp\register_boncoin.py' -Encoding UTF8 -Force; Write-Output 'Script written to C:\temp\gbp\register_boncoin.py'; Write-Output (Get-Content 'C:\temp\gbp\register_boncoin.py' | Measure-Object -Line).Lines; Write-Output 'lines'
description: كتابة سكريبت التسجيل على Google Business Profile إلى ملف محلي
